reasoning.description: Routes that produce verdicts, assessments, or structured judgments where task accuracy and restore cost are high.

composition.description: Routes that generate or draft structured new content such as documents, plans, summaries, or reference material.

execution.description: Routes that implement or apply changes to existing artifacts, including code, configuration, data, or generated output.

transformation.description: Routes that rewrite, convert, or normalize existing content while preserving its original substance and intent.
